## Known Technology Stack

- XMarket: BNB Chain, live
- Frontend: React (react-app-rewired), served via Caddy
- Infrastructure: Ubuntu Linux, 16 GB RAM, Caddy, Anvil (local EVM)
- Tools: Foundry, Node.js v22, Python 3.12, Puppeteer
